content: I keep mixing up days. Yesterday—wait, was it yesterday?—I doubled Dad's Lasix. Or did I? I'm terrified I'll hurt him.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]
My son was with me last week; this week he's at his dad's. The schedule flips my brain. I wrote things down, but then I forget where I put the notebook.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]
My brother says I'm overreacting and that Dad will tell me if something's off. Dad gets confused at night, though.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]
I also can't remember when his last cardiology visit was. Two weeks? A month? Time doesn't feel real.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]
Okay. I'll try phone reminders. Just... please don't tell me to try five apps. My brain is done.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]
